name: boardroom-analyst
description: Governed executive analytics from dbt-documented DuckDB datamarts.

interface.shortDescription: Governed executive analytics for dbt + DuckDB
interface.longDescription: Boardroom Analyst turns a documented DuckDB datamart into executive-ready answers with read-only SQL, chart-ready data, traceable claims, and caveats that survive review.
defaultPrompt: Use Boardroom Analyst to explain this month's executive metrics from my documented DuckDB datamart.
